title: Document LilyGO target support status and limitations
description: Why this exists: contributors and users need to know what exact LilyGO device works, what is experimental, and how to reproduce builds and flashes. What needs to be done: document selected board, hardware revision, supported peripherals, unsupported peripherals, build/flash commands, host prerequisites, smoke-test steps, known issues, and relationship to R1/R1 Neo product target. Acceptance criteria: support status is recorded in project docs or Beads design fields; limitations are explicit; hardware uncertainties and missing tests are represented as Beads; partner/contributor handoff is clear.
